GlobalPolicy.module-level-focus: Fast deterministic unit checks for each module.
GlobalPolicy.wave-level-focus: Integration checks across pipeline stages with synthetic videos.
GlobalPolicy.phase-level-focus: Synthetic video end-to-end tests with metric assertions.
GlobalPolicy.mvp-metrics: <missed_slide_rate val="<=5%" source="synthetic dataset" /> <false_split_rate val="<=10%" source="synthetic dataset" /> <timestamp_error_seconds val="<=1.5" source="at sample_fps=2" />
GlobalPolicy.redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, or raw high-risk payloads.

VF-001.NAME: DetectHappyPath
VF-001.scenario: User provides valid MP4 + SRT — pipeline produces slides.json + images with correct intervals.
VF-001.expected-outcome: slides.json validates, slide images saved, transcript aligned.

VF-002.NAME: ExportMDPath
VF-002.scenario: Valid slides.json → deck.md with correct Marp formatting.
VF-002.expected-outcome: deck.md renders in Marp viewer with images and transcript.

VF-004.NAME: ExportPptxPath
VF-004.scenario: Valid slides.json + images → deck.pptx with full-slide pictures and speaker notes.
VF-004.expected-outcome: deck.pptx has correct slide count, notes contain cleaned transcript, images embedded.

VF-005.NAME: NotesProcessingPath
VF-005.scenario: Segment with SRT cues → process_notes(basic) → clean speaker notes text.
VF-005.expected-outcome: Raw subtitle fragments joined, punctuated, deduplicated into flowing text.

VF-006.NAME: LlmProcessPath
VF-006.scenario: Valid slides.json + slides images + LM Studio running → enriched slides.json with llm_description and corrected transcript.
VF-006.expected-outcome: Each slide gets llm_description with slide content summary, transcript corrected with slide context terms, model unloaded after processing.

VF-003.NAME: GPUAutoFallback
VF-003.scenario: System without CUDA — auto backend falls back to OpenCV with warning.
VF-003.expected-outcome: Pipeline completes on CPU with WARNING log line.

scenarios.scenario-2: SlideSegment defaults are correct.
scenarios.scenario-3: Invalid duration is rejected by ge=0 constraint.

scenarios.scenario-1: YAML + CLI arg merge gives correct precedence.
scenarios.scenario-2: Missing config file falls back to defaults.
Missing video file exits with code 1.
scenarios.scenario-3: CLI overrides are built from flat kwargs.

scenarios.scenario-1: OpenCV backend returns correct frame count.
scenarios.scenario-2: Backend auto-selection falls back to OpenCV.
PyAV frame iteration returns correct count at sample_fps.
scenarios.scenario-3: PyAV iter_frames yields RGB ndarrays with increasing timestamps.
scenarios.scenario-4: PyAV backend is picked by auto when available.
scenarios.scenario-6: PyAV with CUDA hwaccel decodes correctly.

scenarios.scenario-2: Frame iteration returns correct count.
Crop clips to frame boundaries.
Visual distance is symmetric.
scenarios.scenario-3: Auto threshold computation returns reasonable value.

scenarios.scenario-2: VTT parsing returns correct cues.
scenarios.scenario-4: Cue crossing slide boundary assigned to max overlap slide.

scenarios.scenario-2: Short segments handled correctly (merge/warn).
scenarios.scenario-3: Representative timestamp chosen correctly (80% for long, 50% for short).

scenarios.scenario-2: Similar slides with warning are flagged.

scenarios.scenario-1: Marp header and slide content is generated correctly.
scenarios.scenario-2: Timecodes are included in HTML comments.

scenarios.scenario-1: Export creates valid .pptx with correct slide count.
scenarios.scenario-2: Each slide has notes with formatted timestamps and cues.
scenarios.scenario-3: Slide images are embedded when image files exist.
scenarios.scenario-4: Minimal slides.json with no images or cues still exports.
scenarios.scenario-5: Notes mode parameter passed through to process_notes.

scenarios.scenario-1: Basic mode joins SRT cues into continuous text.
scenarios.scenario-2: Basic mode fixes punctuation and capitalizes.
scenarios.scenario-3: Basic mode deduplicates repeated words from SRT overlap.
scenarios.scenario-5: process_notes with basic mode returns cleaned text.

scenarios.scenario-2: Report contains segment details.
Clear slide transition is detected.
scenarios.scenario-3: Short noise (cursor flicker) does not trigger false change.

scenarios.scenario-1: chat() sends correct request format and returns parsed response.
scenarios.scenario-2: vision() sends image as base64 and returns description.
scenarios.scenario-3: load_model() calls LM Studio load endpoint.
scenarios.scenario-4: unload_model() calls LM Studio unload endpoint.
scenarios.scenario-5: Connection refused raises clear error with instructions.
scenarios.scenario-6: Model not found raises clear error.

scenarios.scenario-1: Slide image with text → LLM returns accurate description with visible terms.
scenarios.scenario-2: Slide image without text → LLM returns visual description only.
scenarios.scenario-3: Missing image file raises clear error.
scenarios.scenario-4: LLM vision returns empty → fallback description with warning.

scenarios.scenario-1: Full pipeline: load → analyze slides → rephrase → unload → enriched slides.json with llm_description.
scenarios.scenario-2: Slide descriptions sidecar files written to disk.
scenarios.scenario-3: LM Studio unavailable → graceful abort with clear message, no model leak.
scenarios.scenario-4: Single slide vision fails → warning logged, slide skipped, pipeline continues.
scenarios.scenario-5: Model unloads after processing even on partial failure.

scenarios.scenario-1: Detect command produces slides.json with correct structure.
scenarios.scenario-2: Detect with SRT aligns transcript to slides.

Gate-Phase-1.goal: CLI runs, models validate, config loads.

Gate-Phase-2.goal: OpenCV backend decodes video and iterates frames.

Gate-Phase-3.goal: Synthetic video pipeline produces correct slide intervals.

Gate-Phase-4.goal: Full pipeline: video + subtitles → slides.json + deck.md.

module-checks.check-1: Open in Colab, Runtime → T4 GPU, Run All — pipeline completes without error

scenarios.scenario-1: Notebook runs end-to-end: install → detect → export → download works with sample video.
scenarios.scenario-2: PyAV with CUDA hwaccel auto-detects T4 GPU.
scenarios.scenario-3: Missing video file shows clear error message.

Gate-Phase-5.goal: End-to-end: CLI detect/export-md/debug all work with synthetic video.

Gate-Phase-7.goal: LLM processing pipeline: llm-process command enriches slides.json with vision descriptions and corrected transcript.
